docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION MAR-22-2002, CONTINUED BY COURT TO OCT-29-2002 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 IF THERE ARE NO PROBLEMS WITH THE PAYMENTS, NO APPEARNCES ARE NECESSARY ON 10/29/02 @ 10AM & THE COURT WILL CONTINUE THE ACTION FOR AN ADDITIONAL 6 MONTHS.

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION OCT-29-2002, CONTINUED BY COURT TO APR-29-2003 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 NON-APPEARANCE. IF THERE ARE NO PROBLEMS WITH THE FINAL PAYMENTS, NO APPEARANCES ARE NECESSARY ON 4-29-03 @ 10 AM. AND THE COURT WILL DISMISS THE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE.
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT HERNANDEZ, CLEMENTE HEARING SET FOR JUN-03-2003 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
COURT'S OWN MOTION FOR TIME PAYMENT T/ CALENDARED TO REFLECT TIME PAYMENT GRANTED. MOTION TO VACATE DENIED. JUDGMENT STANDS.
